headline: Why Is Seagate (STX) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of data storage manufacturer Seagate (NASDAQ:STX) jumped 6.6% in the morning session after it announced plans to redeem all outstanding 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028, a move that will strengthen its financial position. The redemption is expected to eliminate approximately $150.7 million of debt, improving the company's capital structure and financial flexibility. headline: Seagate Locks In Nearline Demand And Lifts Long Term Growth Outlook
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) reports that its multi year nearline storage capacity is almost fully allocated through 2027. Management has raised the company’s long term annual revenue growth target to at least 20%. These changes are tied to binding multi year agreements with large cloud customers for high capacity drives. For investors watching Seagate at a share price of $868.09, the news comes on top of an already very strong run in the stock. The company’s return is up 7.3%...
